uz.favourite: Siz sevgan dramalarni bir joyda tomosha qiling.
uz.ads: BU YERDA SIZNING REKLAMANGIZ BO‘LISHI MUMKIN
uz.helpSubtitle: Quyidagi savollar orqali saytdan foydalanishni o‘rganing 👇

faqs.question: SeoulFlix nima?
faqs.answer: SeoulFlix — bu siz sevadigan koreys dramalarini tomosha qilish, ularga like bosish va fikr bildirish imkonini beruvchi platforma.

faqs.question: Qanday qilib tizimga kiraman yoki ro‘yxatdan o‘taman?
faqs.answer: Sahifaning yuqori o‘ng burchagidagi 'Kirish' yoki 'Ro‘yxatdan o‘tish' tugmalaridan foydalaning. Siz Google yoki email orqali hisob yaratishingiz mumkin.

faqs.question: Dramalarga qanday qilib like bosaman?
faqs.answer: Video sahifasida yurak belgisi mavjud. Bosish orqali like berasiz.

faqs.question: Fikr (komment) qoldirish uchun nima qilish kerak?
faqs.answer: Komment yozish uchun siz tizimga kirgan bo‘lishingiz kerak. Keyin video ostidagi matn maydoniga yozib, 'Yuborish' tugmasini bosing.

faqs.question: Boshqa foydalanuvchilar kommentlarimni ko‘ra oladimi?
faqs.answer: Ha, barcha foydalanuvchilar sizning kommentingizni real vaqt rejimida ko‘rishlari mumkin.

faqs.question: Qanday qilib qo‘llab-quvvatlash xizmatiga murojaat qilaman?
faqs.answer: Agar sizda muammo bo‘lsa, bizga Telegram orqali @seoulflix_admin bilan bog‘laning yoki +998 87 355 0024 raqamiga aloqaga chiqing.

faqs.question: Saytdagi filmlar kim tomonidan dublyaj qilinadi?
faqs.answer: Saytdagi barcha filmlar va seriallar Minxo TV jamoasi tomonidan o‘zbek tiliga dublyaj qilinadi.

uz.requireSubtitle: Bu yerda taklif yoki saytda mavjud bo'lmagan yoqtirgan dramangiz nomini yozib qoldirishingiz mumkin
uz.name: Ism
uz.phoneHelper: +998 bilan boshlanadigan 12 ta belgidan iborat bo‘lsin
uz.loginRequired: Iltimos, avval profil yarating yoki tizimga kiring!
uz.passwordShort: Parol kamida 6 ta belgidan iborat bo‘lishi kerak
uz.requiredphone: Telefon raqami +998 bilan boshlanib 9 ta raqamdan iborat bo'lishi kerak

en.favourite: Watch dramas that you liked in one place
en.helpSubtitle: Learn how to use the site through the questions below 👇

faqs.question: What is SeoulFlix?
faqs.answer: SeoulFlix is a platform where you can watch Korean dramas, like them and leave comments.

faqs.question: How can I sign in or register?
faqs.answer: Use the 'Sign In' or 'Sign Up' buttons in the top right corner.

faqs.question: How do I like dramas?
faqs.answer: There is a heart icon on the video page. Click to like.

faqs.question: How can I leave a comment?
faqs.answer: You must be logged in to leave a comment. Then write your comment under the video and click 'Send'.

faqs.question: Can other users see my comments?
faqs.answer: Yes, all users can see your comments in real time.

faqs.question: How can I contact support?
faqs.answer: If you have any issues, contact us via Telegram @seoulflix_admin or call +998 87 355 0024.

faqs.question: How can I support the site?
faqs.answer: You can support us via donation through tirikchilik.uz/seoulflix.

faqs.question: Who dubs the movies on the site?
faqs.answer: All movies and series are dubbed into Uzbek by the Minxo TV team.

en.requireSubtitle: Here you can write your suggestion or the name of a drama you like but is not on the site
en.name: Name
en.phoneHelper: Must start with +998 and contain 12 characters
en.loginRequired: Please create a profile or login first!
en.passwordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
en.requiredphone: The phone number must start with +998 and consist of 9 digits.
